standard: Guide to Road Design Part 3: Geometric Design (AGRD03-16, Ed 3.4, 2021)
notes: Login-gated free PDF, sada pribavljeno (licencirano — ne redistribuira se, gitignored). Rešava raniji needs_manual. NZ usvaja isti AGRD Part 3 (vidi free/NZL_Austroads-NZTA). Current edition: AGRD03-16, Edition 3.4, published 26 Feb 2021, ISBN 978-1-922382-15-3.
